errorMessage.title: Error Message
errorMessage.description: Populated only when Status is Error. Surface this text to the user.

matchCount.title: Match Count
matchCount.description: Number of matching records returned. Use this with Status to determine next steps.

records.title: Records
records.description: List of matched records. Each record has recordId, name, displayLabel, and secondaryInfo. Use displayLabel as-is when presenting options to the user. Use recordId for downstream actions (e.g. Visit Automation Flow, Task Automation Flow).

status.title: Status
status.description: One of: Success, NotFound, TooMany, Error. Drives all branching in topic instructions.
